statement: In every magma, Equation 1156 (`x = y * ((z * (x * z)) * z)`) implies Equation 1947 (`x = (y * (y * z)) * (y * z)`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0132
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z : G, x = (op y (op (op z (op x z)) z))) :
    ∀ x y z : G, x = (op (op y (op y z)) (op y z))
